name: UAC Bypass via Sdclt Detected
description: A User Account Control (UAC) bypass attempt leveraging 'sdclt.exe' and specific registry key modifications has been detected, indicating a potential privilege escalation.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of when the registry modification occurred.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the UAC bypass attempt occurred.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account that performed the registry modification.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The process that performed the registry modification (e.g., powershell.exe, cmd.exe).

parameters.name: TargetObject
parameters.description: The specific registry key path that was modified to facilitate the UAC bypass.

parameters.name: Details
parameters.description: The new value of the registry key, if available (often the command to be executed).

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
